<?php namespace Illuminate\Foundation\Console; use Illuminate\Console\Command; use Symfony\Component\Console\Attribute\AsCommand; #[AsCommand(name: 'clear-compiled')] class ClearCompiledCommand extends Command { /** * The console command name. * * @var string */ protected $name = 'clear-compiled'; /** * The console command description. * * @var string */ protected $description = 'Remove the compiled class file'; /** * Execute the console command. * * @return void */ public function handle() { if (is_file($servicesPath = $this->laravel->getCachedServicesPath())) { @unlink($servicesPath); } if (is_file($packagesPath = $this->laravel->getCachedPackagesPath())) { @unlink($packagesPath); } $this->components->info('Compiled services and packages files removed successfully.'); } }
